repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §3 only records generic PartialID staging plus Manski bounds, and closest banked pid_dose_response_iv_v1 / pid_ordinal_late_partial_defiers_v1 are not multi-IV Bernstein MTE/PRTE kernels

published_prior_art.cite: MogstadTorgovitskyWalters2024 + HanYang2024: published multi-IV MTE aggregation / binary-IV sharp MTE LP machinery already covers much of the primal-LP idea

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue projected joint-vs-best-single-IV moment-cone width proposal found

published_prior_art.cite: MogstadTorgovitskyWalters2024: already extends MST to multiple IVs and shows aggregation can be more informative than using instruments separately; exact projected-width gap is not stated

repo_prior_art.cite: none as a CausalSmith proposal, but it is only a boundary reduction

published_prior_art.cite: MogstadSantosTorgovitsky2018: single-IV Bernstein MTE/PRTE LP benchmark

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; MTW2024 already publishes multiple-IV MTE aggregation that is more informative than separate instruments, so the proposal needs a sharper published-frontier claim than a support-function gap diagnostic.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The projected moment-cone width and quotient cone are not explicitly defined, and the stated width appears to depend on outcome moments gamma and shape system L beta <= r, not only on {(pi_z,p_z)} and the Bernstein basis.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup
soundness_flags.one_line: The coarsened single-coordinate systems M_j,gamma_j are only described as 'analogous'; after marginalizing over Z_-j, the Wald weight is generally a conditional selection-probability contrast, not simply an interval between average propensities.

soundness_flags.label: Assumption 6 / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption nonredundant refers to a best single-coordinate system j^star, but L_sing and U_sing may be attained by different coordinates or ties; the endpoint-specific benchmark is not pinned.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the prose 'projected moment-cone width' with a formal definition: cone, quotient map, projection, support function, dependence on gamma/L/r, and separate upper/lower endpoint versions.
Redefine M_j for a retained coordinate using the exact coarsened IV-like weight E[1{p_Z >= u}|Z_j=1]-E[1{p_Z >= u}|Z_j=0], then show when it reduces to a simple MST propensity interval.

To reach the flagship floor, recast Conjecture 1 as an explicit if-and-only-if frontier between the MST single-IV LP and the MTW2024 mutual-consistency multi-IV strategy, with a computable observable threshold that is not just generic LP duality.
Fix the bibliography metadata for MogstadTorgovitskyWalters2024: verified Journal of Econometrics Volume 243, Issues 1-2, 105718, not Volume 241.

recommended_next_step: Redraft Conjecture 1 and the coarsened single-IV benchmark so the width formula is mathematically explicit and differentiated from MTW2024 strongly enough to meet the flagship target.
